nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.grounding_span: the nuance and hints is where the AI misses every time

nodes.label: AI as tool for feedback and critique
nodes.grounding_span: the AI is a perfectionist- your work will always have a flaw according to AI and it makes it harder to get it out to agents if you dont put your foot down

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant preserving personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: the AI forgot continuity, and hallucinated- rather than reading the chapter- it made up a whole chapter

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement stripping creative process
nodes.grounding_span: its a writing tool, a writing partner, never the author

nodes.label: AI adapting to character voice
nodes.label_negative: AI failing to distinguish character from author
nodes.grounding_span: AI needs to adapt to the character- AI adapts to the person it talks to- my characters arent me- thats also where it fails

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: preserving my writing abilities is very important to me- I dont want AI to write like me

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: AI keeps me focused and logical, it doesnt allow me to drift

nodes.label: Frustration with AI hallucination
nodes.grounding_span: the AI forgot continuity, and hallucinated- rather than reading the chapter- it made up a whole chapter

nodes.label: Positive view of AI as thinking partner
nodes.grounding_span: AI keeps me focused and logical, it doesnt allow me to drift

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI's perfection
nodes.grounding_span: the AI is a perfectionist- your work will always have a flaw according to AI and it makes it harder to get it out to agents if you dont put your foot down

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: Oh I go back and forth lol

nodes.label: Sacred, autonomous creative process
nodes.grounding_span: its a very sacred, almost religious process to me
